summary: Student executive organizing IT events, workshops, booths, and tech competitions at CLSU.
body: As Project Manager, I collaborated with a team of fellow student executives in organizing IT-related events, booths, workshops, and tech competitions for the college.
I coordinated timelines, resources, and task distribution across the organization's projects, and worked with faculty advisers and external partners to deliver successful college-based activities.

summary: BSIT major in Systems Development — GWA 1.51, University Scholar, expected April 2027.
body: I'm pursuing a Bachelor of Science in Information Technology, major in Systems Development, at Central Luzon State University in the Science City of Muñoz, Nueva Ecija — expected to graduate April 2027 with a GWA of 1.51.
Academic honors: College Scholar (1st semester, 1st year), University Scholar (both semesters, 2nd year), and College & University Scholar (both semesters, 3rd year).

Relevant coursework includes Data Structures & Algorithms, Operating Systems, Databases, Machine Learning, and Artificial Intelligence. My capstone is the development of a web-based interactive virtual tour of CLSU.
